name: v1.1.0 — Enom Registrar
body:
## v1.1.0 — Enom (Tucows) Registrar Integration

Adds Enom as a second supported domain registrar alongside ResellerClub. Enom is the most widely-used registrar among WHMCS resellers.

### Enom API
- Protocol: HTTPS GET, XML responses
- Auth: `uid` + `pw` query params on every request
- Sandbox: `resellertest.enom.com` (toggle per-module in Settings → Registrar)
- Production: `www.enom.com`
- Docs: https://www.enom.com/APICommandCatalog/

### Commands Implemented
| Command | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `Check` | Bulk availability via numbered SLD1/TLD1 params |
| `Purchase` | Register domain with full registrant/admin/tech/auxbilling contacts |
| `Extend` | Renew domain |
| `TP_CreateOrder` | Initiate transfer with EPP code |
| `GetDomainInfo` | Sync status, expiry date, nameservers |
| `ModifyNS` | Update nameservers |
| `GetAuthInfo` | Retrieve EPP/auth code |
| `SetRegLock` | Lock/unlock transfer (`UnlockRegistrar=0/1`) |
| `GetWhoisGuardInfo` + `PurchaseServices` + `SetWhoisGuardEnabled` | WHOIS privacy via WhoisGuard |
| `Hello` | Connection test |

### Settings
- `enom_uid` — Enom reseller account username
- `enom_pw` — Enom reseller account password
- `enom_sandbox` — Routes calls to `resellertest.enom.com`

All stored under the `registrar` settings group alongside existing ResellerClub keys.

### Settings UI
The Settings → Registrar tab now uses an Alpine.js `x-show` toggle to display only the credential fields relevant to the selected module. Switching between ResellerClub and Enom hides/shows the appropriate fields.

### Technical Notes
- Phone format: E.164 (`+12025551234`) is converted to Enom format (`+1.2025551234`) with best-effort country code prefix splitting
- XML parsing uses `simplexml_load_string` with `libxml_use_internal_errors(true)` to suppress warnings from occasional malformed Enom responses
- Enom returns error count in `<ErrCount>` and messages in `<errors><Err1>` — both are checked
- Enom RRPCode `210` = available, `211` = not available (for Check command)
